jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue
jobs.rawDescription: Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue Company: Ayesa Digital Location: Spain ¡En Ayesa crecemos Contigo! Cada profesional de nuestra empresa es importante para nosotros, nos ayudan a crecer de manera diversa y gracias a ellos somos más de 11.000 personas trabajando con el mismo objetivo internacionalmente en 10 países. Si eres una persona entusiasta y buscas un nuevo reto profesional, ¡Este es tu sitio! Buscamos ampliar nuestro equipo con un/a Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue y comunicaciones para incorporarse con nosotros. ¡Anímate a dar el salto! ¡Te estamos esperando! ¿Qué vas a hacer? Desarrollar nuevas funcionalidades, junto al equipo, en Vue.js ¿Qué te pedimos? Desarrollar nuevas funcionalidades, junto al equipo, en Vue.js (Vue 3 con Composition API), TypeScript y Tailwind CSS. Dominio de programación reactiva con la Reactivity API de Vue (ref, reactive, computed, watch) y/o VueUse, y experiencia en la integración y consumo de APIs. Experiencia escribiendo tests unitarios para asegurar la calidad y estabilidad del código. Aplicar buenas prácticas en arquitectura de componentes, modularidad y optimización de rendimiento de aplicaciones SPA. Experiencia trabajando con Git. Capacidad de trabajo en equipo, ser una persona detallista y con capacidad resolutiva. Alta capacidad de participación y proactividad, ser una persona comunicativa con el resto del equipo. Experiencia en el manejo de estados complejos con librerías como Pinia o Vuex. Conocimientos en Cloud y flujos de integración/despliegue continuo (CI/CD). Experiencia previa trabajando con Node o Python en el lado del backend. ¿Dónde trabajarás? Remoto 100% ¿Qué horario realizarás? - 40 horas semanales. Te ofrecemos un camino lleno de aventuras: · ¡Llega hasta donde tú quieras! ¡Crece con nuestros programas de desarrollo! Te ayudaremos a marcar tu itinerario de futuro anualmente participando en proyectos vanguardistas con los mejores profesionales del sector. · Porque lo importante sois tú y los tuyos : contamos con po

score.reason: Spanish-language role, 100% remote, Spain-based with CET hours. Perfect stack match: Vue 3 Composition API, TypeScript, Tailwind, Pinia. Senior-level architectural focus (component design, state management, testing, performance optimization). No gaps or red flags.

jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bulgaria, Bosnia, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: Strong TypeScript (Expert) match and correct seniority level. Excellent location fit (Spain listed). However, n8n is a backend-heavy workflow orchestration platform with significant Node.js emphasis—Alfonso's Node.js depth is basic, and Vue appears to be secondary to the platform's backend focus.

jobs.title: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers
jobs.rawDescription: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers Blackshark AI | Software Engineers & Platform Engineers | Full-time | Austria or Remote EU Hours | VISA sponsorship available We build geospatial AI infrastructure. Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. We just shipped a planetary-scale simulation platform with Lockheed Martin powered by Unreal Engine. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. Our training and inference infrastructure is processing trillions of pixels and we deliver real world impact for our customers across defense, intelligence, and local governments. Tech Stack: Python, Fast API, PyTorch, Postgres, Redis, Vue.js Infrastructure Stack: Kubernetes & Docker, Linux, AWS & Azure, Azure DevOps, Terraform, ELK, Prometheus & Grafana, ArgoCD & Helm Roles: Software Engineer - Frontend UI https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/5c596b85-5134-4601-be25-... jobs.title: Intermediate Frontend Engineer (Vue.js), Plan: Product Planning
jobs.rawDescription: GitLab is an open-core software company that develops the most comprehensive AI-powered DevSecOps Platform, used by more than 100,000 organizations. Our mission is to enable everyone to contribute to and co-create the software that powers our world. When everyone can contribute, consumers become contributors, significantly accelerating human progress. Our platform unites teams and organizations, breaking down barriers and redefining what's possible in software development. Thanks to products like Duo Enterprise and Duo Agent Platform, customers get AI benefits at every stage of the SDLC. The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software. An overview of this role As a frontend engineer on the Plan: Product Planning team you’ll work primarily on the work-items views. Read more in our epics: lists, agile boards, table view, saved views. We’re currently a team of 5 backend, 3 frontend, and 1 fullstack engineer, a product manager, an engineering manager, and a designer. We work in smaller sub-teams of 2-5 engineers focusing on a single project for 1-3 months. Every month one engineer is assigned to the quality rotation working on performance, monitoring, security vulnerabilities, and maintenance issues. We meet once a week, project teams can have their own calls, but we mostly work asynchronously. We mostly work with Vue.js and Apollo Client moving GitLab into the SPA-like experienc

score.reason: Vue.js is the primary framework, matching Alfonso's core expertise. However, this is an intermediate-level role for a 10+ year senior engineer, and the posting is incomplete (cuts mid-sentence). Seniority mismatch is disqualifying.

jobs.title: Senior Developer FullStack (Vue y Nodejs). Inglés alto.
jobs.rawDescription: ¡Atención, amante de la tecnología! Si eres una persona curiosa, creativa y con pasión por la innovación, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti! En nuestro equipo, buscamos mentes inquietas como la tuya, dispuestas a formar parte de Comunidades tecnológicas donde construir conjuntamente. ¡Prepárate para un viaje emocionante! Pero antes de nada, ¿nos presentamos? Somos atmira, un ecosistema de interacción centrado en las personas. Nuestro objetivo es ayudarte a desarrollarte tanto personal como profesionalmente. A través de nuestro Club, podrás relacionarte, vivir experiencias profesionales y alcanzar tus metas. En atmira, tú eres el protagonista y tienes el poder de explorar tu potencial con #Icouldbe Y ahora que ya nos conocemos un poco más… ¿A qué te vas a dedicar? Trabajarás en un proyecto junto a uno de nuestros clientes donde podrás realizar desarrollos y dar apoyo técnico al mismo. Tus funciones principales serán las siguientes: • Participar en el análisis funcional de las necesidades del usuario (Kanban/Agile). • Elaborar diseños técnicos basados en especificaciones funcionales. • Analizar y desarrollar componentes utilizando lenguajes definidos e interfaces. • contribuir al desarrollo y la implementación de aplicaciones (prototipos y módulos). • Documentar todo el trabajo de desarrollo, componentes y módulos según los estándares. • Participar en revisiones de código. • Definir protocolos y escenarios de pruebas de integración. • Realizar pruebas, identificar y resolver cualquier problema. • Participar en el mantenimiento correctivo y evolutivo de todas las aplicaciones desarrolladas. • Proponer mejoras durante las reuniones técnicas. Con qué tecnología trabajarás principalmente? Trabajarás con Vue.js, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, MVC, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Linux, TDD, GIT, SCRUM, Kanban. Es necesario un nivel de inglés alto porque es un proyecto internacional. ¿Te resulta interesante? Tenemos más que contarte: 🌱 Un fantástico equipo de personas que te ayudará

score.reason: Strong Vue expertise and perfect seniority/location fit in Spain, but fullstack role requires deeper Node.js knowledge than Alfonso's basic backend background, and staff-augmentation placement model raises significant concerns about project stability and career fit.

needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. needsReview.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: We are looking for new professionals to join Pareto's journey Pareto is a growing software company built around experienced professionals and a sharp focus on what delivers results. We currently have over 50 senior software professionals on our team, and we’re hiring more this year. We’re looking for an experienced fullstack developer who wants to work on challenging client projects across industries. What will you do? You will work on our clients’ product development, typically as a developer, occasionally as an architect or technical lead when the project calls for it. We deliver full projects and integrate into our clients’ teams. Projects span industries like technology, manufacturing, defense, process industry, energy, logistics, food production, healthcare, and the public sector. The common factor: complex systems that require broad technical expertise across the full stack. You’ll have direct influence on client projects, technology choices, and engineering practices. What we expect At least 8 years of experience in software development. You work across the full stack and take ownership of what you build. Interest in AI-assisted development is expected. Experience with tools like Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar is an advantage. We work AI-natively and expect our developers to do the same. Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React or Vue, and solid backend skills in Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, or similar. Databases and integrations are familiar territory. Experience with cloud platforms, primarily Azure or AWS. Ability to work with clients. You can communicate technical decisions in business terms and adapt to different organizational contexts. High standards for code quality. Maintainability, testability, and DevOps practices are part of how you work every day. What we offer Salary based on your experience: 4500–6500 EUR/month. Comprehensive benefits: extensive occupational healthcare, leisure-time accident and travel insuran
